results.name: segovia
results.description: A plane where everything is tiny, created as a joke to explain why Segovian Leviathan is only a 3/3 creature despite being a Leviathan.

results.name: sejiri
results.description: A continent of Zendikar

results.name: selective group hug
results.description: Group Hug cards that benefit only certain opponents in particular.

results.name: self-discard matters
results.description: Cards that reward you for tossing your own hand into the graveyard. For cards that reward you for having a small hand, see [hellbent](hellbent) and [heckbent](heckbent).

results.name: selfie
results.description: When a creature looks like it could be using a selfie stick by extending an object past the frame, or for actual selfies.

results.name: self portrait
results.description: Artwork in which the artist has depicted themselves.

results.name: self-replacement effect
results.description: A resolving spell or ability partially or completely replacing one of its own effects.

results.name: serra paladin symbol
results.description: The symbol of the Serra Paladins, somewhat resembling a bird.

results.name: serra's realm
results.description: An artificial plane created by Serra.

results.name: serra's symbol
results.description: The symbol of Serra: a circle with two opposed golden quarters and two opposed silver quarters.

results.name: setessa
results.description: A polis of Theros.

results.name: set life total
results.description: Your life total becomes N. See also [life divider](/tags/card/life-divider) and [life doubler](/tags/card/life-doubler).

results.name: seven steel thanes
results.description: The faction of Black-aligned New Phyrexians

results.name: severed finger
results.description: Fingers not connected to their hand. Ouch!

results.name: sexually suggestive
results.description: Hints at sexual intercourse, or other sexual acts. See also [phallic](phallic) and [vulvic](vulvic).

results.name: shade
results.description: Shade creatures

results.name: shade pump
results.description: Effects that give an arbitrary amount of +1/+1 until end of turn. See also [firebreathing] in red and [armoring] in white.

results.name: shadow
results.description: Depicts a shadow cast by a subject in or out of frame (not to be confused with a silhouette)

results.name: shadow alley
results.description: A street on Ravnica.

results.name: shadowmoor
results.description: The night aspect of the Lorwyn-Shadowmoor plane, a world based on Celtic folklore and mythology.

results.name: shadowspear
results.description: The shadowy spear pulled from [Khrusor](/tags/artwork/khrusor)'s shadow.
